personas.name: Product
personas.description: Decides what to build, for whom, and in what order. Produces intent, priorities, and success criteria. Consumes shipping status, discoveries, and design rationale.

personas.name: Design
personas.description: Decides how the product is experienced. Produces design rationale, UX trade-offs, and rejected alternatives. Consumes product intent, engineering constraints, and usage data.

personas.name: Engineering
personas.description: Decides how to build it and implementation trade-offs. Produces decisions, discoveries, and drift signals. Consumes product context, design rationale, and strategic constraints.

personas.name: Strategy
personas.description: Decides where next, technology bets, and team enablement. Produces research outcomes, prototypes, and direction. Consumes cross-team patterns, drift trends, and capability gaps.
